Here is the list of sign names, scores, and descriptions:
1. Aries - 7/10 - Strong sense of independence, but can be impulsive and reckless.
2. Taurus - 8/10 - Practical and reliable, but can be stubborn and resistant to change.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, but can be scattered and unreliable.
4. Cancer - 6/10 - Nurturing and empathetic, but can be moody and overly emotional.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, but can be prideful and domineering.
6. Virgo - 9/10 - Analytical and hardworking, but can be perfectionistic and critical.
7. Libra - 8/10 - Diplomatic and social, but can be indecisive and people-pleasing.
8. Scorpio - 8/10 - Passionate and intense, but can be secretive and controlling.
9. Sagittarius - 7/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, but can be blunt and tactless.
10. Capricorn - 6/10 - Disciplined and responsible, but can be pessimistic and restrictive.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Humanitarian and independent, but can be rebellious and unpredictable.
12. Pisces - 5/10 - Imaginative and compassionate, but can be dreamy and unrealistic.
